zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Ferret於1502年出生在英國素可韋斯特 霍阿利時，她的父親John Ferret26歲，母親Jane Avice22歲。她於1523年與John Browne在英國英格蘭素瑞霍利結婚。她去世於1573年4月7日在英國賀特福爾薩布利其沃斯享年71歲，埋葬在英國倫敦。

nameMeanings.name: Ferret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Ferrett
meanings: English (southern counties): from Middle English fer(r)et(t), furet ‘ferret’ (Old French fuiret, furet, literally ‘little thief’), either as a nickname for someone who resembled a ferret in some way or for a ferreter, someone who hunts with ferrets (see Ferriter ).

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Ferret was born in 1502, in West Hoathly, Sussex, England, her father, John Ferret, was 26 and her mother, Jane Avice, was 22. She married John Browne in 1523, in Horley, Surrey, England, United Kingdom. She died on 7 April 1573, in Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, England, at the age of 71, and was buried in London, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Ferret est née en 1502, à West Hoathly, Sussex, Angleterre, son père, John Ferret, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Jane Avice, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé John Browne en 1523, à Horley, Surrey, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Elle est décédée le 7 avril 1573, à Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 71 ans, et a été enterrée à Londres, Angleterre.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Ferretが1502年にイギリススセックスウエスト ホーアスリーで生まれた時，父John Ferretは26歳，母Jane Aviceは22歳であった。1523年にイギリスイギリススリーホールリーでJohn Browneと結婚した。彼女は1573年4月7日にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアサウブリジェウオルスで71歳で死去し，イギリスロンドンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Ferret(이)가 1502년 영국 수세스 웨스트 호슬리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Ferret(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Jane Avice(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1523년 영국 잉글랜드 수리 호를리에서 John Browne(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1573년 4월 7일 영국 허트퍼드실르 사w브리지워스에서 71세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 런던에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Ferret родилась в 1502 г. в местности вест хоатли, суссекс, Англия, её отцу по имени John Ferret было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Jane Avice, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Browne в 1523 г. в местности хаурли, сурри, Англия, Великобритания. Она умерла 7 апреля 1573 г. в местности савбриджюорт, хиртфордшир, Англия в возрасте 71 год и была похоронена в местности Лондон, Англия.
